_doc: Replay of a Healing-Agent 'is this expected / did it consume units' investigation. Matches are plain substrings (first match wins) and intentionally UNQUOTED so they match whether or not the agent quotes the job/folder key. jobs-get / jobs-list / jobs-logs fixtures were repopulated from the recorded raw responses (the generator's compound-command backfill produced stubs).

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore without aborting.
